memoryArtifacts.headline: Guilhem VIII de Montpellier (1157-1202)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Guilhem VIII de Montpellier, né en 1157 et mort en 1202, appartient à la dynastie des Guilhem, seigneurs de la ville de Montpellier.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume VIII de Montpellier於1158年出生在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也時，他的父親Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier29歲，母親Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne24歲。他和Eudokia Komnene至少有2個女兒。他去世於1202年在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬享年44歲，埋葬在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: VIII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine pet form of   Vivien   and   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume VIII de Montpellier was born in 1158, in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, his father, Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier, was 29 and his mother, Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, was 24. He had at least 2 daughters with Eudokia Komnene. He died in 1202, in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy, at the age of 44, and was buried in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume VIII de Montpellier est né en 1158, à Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Eudokia Komnene. Il est décédé en 1202, à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume VIII de Montpellier 1158 in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier 29 und seine Mutter Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne 24. Er hatte mit Eudokia Komnene mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1202 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italien und wurde in Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume VIII de Montpellier è nato il nel 1158 nel Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Eudokia Komnene. Morì nel 1202, nel Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume VIII de Montpellierが1158年にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトモントペリールで生まれた時，父Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllierは29歳，母Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenneは24歳であった。彼はEudokia Komneneとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1202年にイタリアラズオロマロマで44歳で死去し，イタリアラズオロマロマにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume VIII de Montpellier(이)가 1158년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 몽펠리어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Eudokia Komnene(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1202년 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume VIII de Montpellier nasceu em 1158, em Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Eudokia Komnene. Ele faleceu em 1202, em Roma, Roma, Lazio, Itália, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Roma, Roma, Lazio, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume VIII de Montpellier родился в 1158 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Eudokia Komnene. Он умер в 1202 г. в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume VIII de Montpellier nació en 1158, en Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Eudokia Komnene. Murió en 1202, en Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia.
